summary: Russell arrives at Silverstone brimming with momentum after dismantling the field in Austria, seeking to convert his proven racecraft into a maiden home victory for Mercedes. Hamilton's blistering pace in practice and sprint pole position signals Ferrari's threat, yet Antonelli's aggressive overtake in the sprint demonstrates Mercedes' sprint-race mastery could prove decisive in the main event. A dominant performance on home soil would catapult Russell into serious title contention while simultaneously answering whether Mercedes can muscle back into the championship fight against Ferrari's recent resurgence.
